2024May 12, 2024

🇰🇷 Seoul, Korea

Resolutions of the plenary meeting of ISO/TC 184/SC 4, Seoul, Korea, May 12, 2024 -- May 17, 2024

Meeting URNurn:iso:tc:184:sc:4:meeting:plenary-2024-05-seoul-korea

12 Resolutions

1141Plenary
Launch PWI for technical report on product data visualization
SC 4 requests its Committee Manager to coordinate with ISO/CS to initiate the development of a technical report with the title "Automation systems and integration -- Industrial data -- Industrial r...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1140Plenary
Update ISO/TC 184/SC 4 Handbook via CIB
SC 4 requests its Committee Manager submit ISO/TC 184/SC 4/PPC N308 for a Committee Internal Ballot of eight weeks duration for approval as a standing document of SC 4 and replace the current SC 4 ...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1139Plenary
Restructure ISO 18136 as a multi-part standard
SC 4 accepts the recommendation of WG 3 and requests its Committee Manager coordinate with ISO/CS and designate project id 85184 as ISO/CD 18136-1 and recognize ISO 18136 as a multi-part standard a...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1138Plenary
Appoint Convenors and Deputy Convenors for SC 4

ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1137Plenary
Set 8-week ballot duration for new work item proposals

1136Plenary
Approve Project Leaders and Project Editors for SC 4 Projects

Acclamation
Acclamation
SC 4 expresses its sincere appreciation to all the experts, delegates, and leaders for successfully executing our Spring plenary meeting in a hybrid format.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
ISO/TC 184/SC 4

Industrial data

Standardization of the content, meaning, structure, representation and quality management of information for engineered products throughout their lifecycle.

Committee

  • Secretariat: ANSI (Secretariat)
  • Chair: Kenneth Swope
  • Established: 1984
  • Standards: 822 published
  • Members: 21 (P), 14 (O)
